name: Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly cream together the butter, peanut butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs and vanilla; mix well.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, and salt) and blend into the creamed mixture until just combined.
4. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
5. Roll each ball in granulated sugar.
6. Place the cookies about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Press a whole peanut or crisscross with two peanuts onto each cookie.
8. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden.
9. Cool slightly before removing from the pan.
Makes approximately 8 dozen cookies.
